storyboard.title: The Breaking of the Wheel

panels.sceneDescription: Daenerys turns away from the throne, looking out over the ruined city. The sheer scale of the devastation finally hits her, and her resolute facade crumbles into profound grief.
panels.dialogue: Look at what I've done... So much blood.
panels.environment: Ruined Throne Room of the Red Keep

panels.sceneDescription: She physically breaks down, knees buckling. Jon steps forward, catching her in a tight, protective embrace. He comforts her as they stand in the ruins.
panels.environment: Ruined Throne Room of the Red Keep

panels.sceneDescription: Together, they command Drogon to destroy the Iron Throne. The dragon breathes a torrent of fire, melting the symbol of power as Jon and Daenerys watch.
panels.environment: Ruined Throne Room of the Red Keep

storyboard.musicPrompt: Somber orchestral rising to triumphant, bittersweet strings
